ingestion.sourceSpecsRaw:
11-20mm F/2.8 Di III-A RXD (Model B060)
The page is Tamron's lens product [11-20mm F/2.8 Di III-A RXD (Model B060)]. Product Page | 11-20mm F/2.8 Di III-A RXD (Model B060) is the world's first compact, lightweight F2.8 ultra wide-angle zoom lens for Sony E-mount APS-C mirrorless cameras. Can be a great choice for video shooting.
Covering focal lengths from 11-20mm, this ultra wide-angle lens for APS-C mirrorless cameras features a maximum aperture of F2.8 and allows users to fully enjoy the distinctive depth-of-field and unique perspective provided by an ultra wide-angle lens.
The lens was designed to be exceptionally compact and lightweight.
Specifications:
Angle of View (diagonal) 105°20'-71°35' (for Sony E-mount and FUJIFILM X mount)
Optical Construction 12 elements in 10 groups
Minimum Object Distance 0.15m (5.9 in) (WIDE) / 0.24m (9.4 in) (TELE)
Maximum Magnification Ratio 1:4 (WIDE) / 1:7.6 (TELE)
Filter Size Φ67mm
Maximum Diameter Φ73mm
Length 86.5mm / 3.4 in (for FUJIFILM X mount)
Weight 335g / 11.8oz (for Sony E-mount and FUJIFILM X mount)
Aperture Blades 7 (circular diaphragm)
Minimum Aperture F16
Mount SONY E Mount / FUJIFILM X Mount / CANON RF Mount
Release Date July 8, 2022 (FUJIFILM X Mount)

reviewNotes.apertureRing: The official global materials do not explicitly mention a physical aperture ring; left blank.

lensConfiguration.otherNotes: Includes 2 GM aspherical elements and 1 aspherical hybrid lens element.

ingestion.sourceSpecsRaw:
17-70mm F/2.8 Di III-A VC RXD (Model B070)
The page is Tamron's lens product [17-70mm F/2.8 Di III-A VC RXD (Model B070)]. The 17-70mm F/2.8 Di III-A VC RXD (Model B070) is a large-aperture standard zoom lens for APS-C format mirrorless cameras. With a focal length range of 17mm to 70mm (a full-frame equivalent of 25.5-105mm) for daily use, this achieves a 4.1x zoom.
The lens is equipped with TAMRON's proprietary VC (Vibration Compensation) and RXD (Rapid eXtra-silent stepping Drive) AF drive system.
It also incorporates Moisture-Resistant Construction and Fluorine Coating.
Specifications:
Angle of View (diagonal) 79°55'-23°00' (for APS-C frame mirrorless format)
Optical Construction 16 elements in 12 groups
Minimum Object Distance 0.19m (7.5 in) (WIDE) / 0.39m (15.4 in) (TELE)
Maximum Magnification Ratio 1:4.8 (WIDE) / 1:5.2 (TELE)
VC (Vibration Compensation) 〇
Filter Size Φ67mm
Maximum Diameter Φ74.6mm
Length 119.6mm / 4.7 in (FUJIFILM)
Weight 530g / 18.7 oz (FUJIFILM)
Aperture Blades 9 (circular diaphragm)
Minimum Aperture F22
Mount SONY E Mount / FUJIFILM X Mount
Release Date July 8, 2022 (FUJIFILM X Mount)
